name: Saturated 6/9 Shimmer
vibe: Massive fuzz wash. Extensions generate beautiful, dreamy ambient shoegaze spaces.

name: The Cascading Descent
vibe: Midwest Emo/Math Rock. Smooth voice-leading with open top strings ringing.

name: The Sinking Valley
